description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a rectangular slide and a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The grip is ergonomically contoured and appears to be made of a polymer material, with a smooth surface and subtle texturing for improved handling. The magazine is partially ejected, revealing brass-colored cartridges, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The slide has minimal visible markings, maintaining a sleek and utilitarian appearance. The suppressor is long and matches the color of the handgun, contributing to a tactical aesthetic. The overall design is compact, functional, and typical of handguns used in urban environments.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a suppressor, ergonomic grip, and partially ejected magazine showing brass cartridges. The design is sleek, modern, and tactical.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handgun, suppressor, and partially ejected magazine with visible cartridges.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the grip, trigger guard, and the open magazine well with cartridges visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the slide, suppressor, and the ejection port, with the magazine and cartridges below.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view emphasizing the back of the grip, the magazine base, and the alignment of the suppressor.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a smooth, matte black polymer surface, featuring subtle texturing for enhanced handling. Its shape is slightly curved to fit the palm comfortably, with a gentle swell at the backstrap and a flat base. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, giving it a minimalist and functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a thick profile and ample space for finger placement. It lacks undercuts or squared-off edges, maintaining a classic oval shape without visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is straightforward and functional, without integrated accessories or distinctive styling.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is extended and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor, giving it a tactical profile. The suppressor is smooth, matte black, and matches the finish of the handgun. No external markings or fluting are visible on the barrel or suppressor.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide appears to have minimal or no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions. There are no prominent manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations visible in the images, contributing to a clean and utilitarian look.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, with a smooth surface and no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing. Its design is simple and flush with the grip, lacking any flared or beveled features.
